name: Freezer Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the pecans, gingersnaps, sugar, and butter; mix well. Press into a 9-inch pie pan and bake at 450°F for five minutes. Cool completely.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat together pumpkin, brown sugar, salt, ground ginger, ground nutmeg, and vanilla ice cream until well-blended.
3. Spoon into crust. Freeze until firm at least 2-3 hours. Store in freezer.
NOTE: This recipe bakes almost no and is very easy. Different crust. SOURCE: Taste of Home Magazine; October/November 1994 issue.
